title: kaempferia picheansoonthonii
intro: Kaempferia picheansoonthonii, also known as the "Black Ginger", is a species of plant that belongs to the ginger family (Zingiberaceae) and is native to Thailand. The medicinal properties of Kaempferia picheansoonthonii include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to improve blood circulation, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve immune function. Kaempferia picheansoonthonii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, capsule, and tincture, and is often used in traditional Thai medicine.
